system.notes: Replacement tires (spares take ½ Body CF). Cost each by type: Standard Body × 50¥ (halves suspension/Handling mod benefits), Performance Body × 75¥ (for improved suspension/drive-by-wire), Off-Road Body × 125¥ (required for off-road suspension), Dual-Purpose Body × 250¥ (on/off-road active suspension); Runflat = tire cost + 200¥ (5/3 armor protection). Rigger 2 p.146.
